name: Brandon Drury
transactions: June 8, 2010:Drafted by theAtlanta Bravesin the13th roundof the 2010 amateur draft. Player signed June 9, 2010.
January 24, 2013:Traded by theAtlanta BraveswithNick Ahmed,Randall Delgado,Martín PradoandZeke Spruillto theArizona DiamondbacksforChris JohnsonandJustin Upton.

February 20, 2018:Traded as part of a 3-team trade by theArizona Diamondbacksto theNew York Yankees.  TheNew York YankeessentNick Solakto theTampa Bay Rays.  TheNew York YankeessentTaylor Widenerto theArizona Diamondbacks.  TheArizona Diamondbackssent players to be named later andAnthony Bandato theTampa Bay Rays.  TheTampa Bay RayssentSteven Souza Jr.to theArizona Diamondbacks. TheArizona DiamondbackssentSam McWilliams(minors) (May 1, 2018) andColin Poche(May 1, 2018) to theTampa Bay Raysto complete the trade.
July 26, 2018:Traded by theNew York YankeeswithBilly McKinneyto theToronto Blue JaysforJ.A. Happ.
January 5, 2021:Signed as a Free Agent with theNew York Mets.
March 21, 2022:Signed as a Free Agent with theCincinnati Reds.
August 2, 2022:Traded by theCincinnati Redsto theSan Diego PadresforVictor Acosta(minors).
December 22, 2022:Signed as a Free Agent with theLos Angeles Angels.
February 9, 2025:Signed as a Free Agent with theChicago White Sox.
April 8, 2025:Signed as a Free Agent with theChicago White Sox.
July 1, 2025:Signed as a Free Agent with theLos Angeles Angels.
February 4, 2026:Signed as a Free Agent with theKansas City Royals.
